summary.headline: Repository discipline is intact. The prompt's repo-scan focus areas (direct prisma imports, missing requireRole, missing validate, missing audit/event, localStorage tokens) all return zero findings. The genuine gaps are in test depth and a handful of fail-soft TODOs, not in architecture.

directPrismaImports.description: API services that import the prisma client directly (excluding `import type { Prisma }` which is a TYPE-ONLY namespace import — not the client).
directPrismaImports.note: All 49 service files use `import type { Prisma } from '@prisma/client'` for input/return type shaping only. Persistence is routed through `server/src/repositories/*` per the repository pattern. Two grep matches for `prisma.` in `server/src/api/enrolments/enrolments.service.ts` and `server/src/api/applications/applications.schema.ts` are inside comments, not code.

mutationsMissingAuditOrEvent.description: Service files containing mutation calls but missing logAudit or emitEvent calls.
mutationsMissingAuditOrEvent.note: Every mutating service in the 44 routed modules calls both logAudit() and emitEvent(). Modules with audit=0/emit=0 in the heuristic scan (audit, calendar, dashboard, statutory-returns, timetable) are read-only or aggregator services with no mutations and are correctly silent on both.

routersMissingRequireRole.description: Routers exposing mutating verbs (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE) without requireRole middleware.
routersMissingRequireRole.note: All 44 routers attach requireRole on every mutating route. The `audit` router has 0 mutations and 2 requireRole calls (read-only RBAC) — correct.

routersMissingValidate.description: Routers exposing mutating verbs without validate() middleware.
routersMissingValidate.note: All 44 routers attach validate() on mutating routes. The `audit` and `reports` routers do not validate POST/PUT bodies because they have no mutating verbs (or only filtered queries) — correct by design.

clientStorageOfTokens.description: Client files using localStorage or sessionStorage.
clientStorageOfTokens.note: Only mention is in `client/src/lib/auth.ts` lines 19 and 172 — both inside comments confirming the no-storage policy. No localStorage or sessionStorage calls are made anywhere in client/src.

testInventory.note: Note that `applications.service.test.ts` is not present, but `admissions.service.test.ts` covers the application lifecycle state machine and the offer-condition auto-promotion evaluator from `applications.service.ts`. The 16 unit test files target the highest-risk surfaces (lifecycles, business rules, mutations) — coverage threshold is intentionally 0 with monitor-only enforcement (KI-P14-002 sequenced to Phase 17).

ci.yml::server-quality — server tsc + Vitest + prisma validate
missing: Integration suite that runs against docker-compose Postgres/Redis/MinIO — currently manual; sequenced to Phase 20.

stalePhaseLabels: Multiple `// TODO ... in Phase 9` markers in client/src/services/*.service.ts despite Phase 9 being closed (see todosAndFixmes above).
duplicateBarrelDirectories: server/src/api/identity (group-index) vs no specific runtime entity
anomalies.duplicateBarrelDirectoriesNote: These 9 directories are intentional barrel groups introduced in Phase 12a. They expose `/api/v1/{group}/health` aggregator endpoints over the existing flat routers. They are not duplicate domains and should not be refactored.
